scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend && npm run install:pipeline
scripts.install:frontend: cd kelo_ui && bun install || npm install
scripts.install:pipeline: cd pipeline && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND,PIPELINE" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:pipeline"
